channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: PACK. A. SANDWHICH. WITH. SOME. CHIPS. — 120 replies — 341.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
PACK. A. SANDWHICH. WITH. SOME. CHIPS.

Open thread • Replies: 120 • Updated: 2026-05-23 01:06 UTC

OP

PACK. A. SANDWHICH.

WITH. SOME. CHIPS.

Early replies (first 3)

62262487
>>62262449
maybe don't buy guac if you are poor and it costs $4.90

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263507
>>62263476
They aren’t. Any more questions, retard?

62263513
>>62263476
>>62263476
> I am entitled to beef and steak even when I can’t afford it
> I am entitled to having someone else cook for me even when I have no money

Why are liberals such entitled babies that think everyone should give them steaks for free?

62263521
>>62263483
To do it quickly, cheaply, and have it taste restaurant quality, yes I would say that makes me likely above average intelligence. I don’t see anyone else doing it. While I might add, being fit, having a career, and a side business. It’s not like I’m on welfare and have nothing to do but think of my next meal.

So are you going to say something or just ask more questions like a cowardly little faggot. How about instead of asking questions, be a first mover. Have your own fucking idea. Take a stance on something by and defend it. Instead of larping as Socrates which I doubt you even know you’re doing.

62263530
>>62262851
>why are you looking at the price of an asset which has been a standard unit of value for all human history

62263539
>>62263513
You'll never get a house even if you drop the beef. Just eat it.

62263573
>>62263539
I already own a house and eat steak whenever I want because I’m not some poor person whining about what I can’t afford

62263602
>>62263513
Whatever happened to the American dream? Is it really now just to slave away at a minimum wage job all your life or die if you get sick because you get put into generational debt?

62263622
Back in my day we went to imright.com to dig up facts to support our points. Nowadays the kids just generate ai responses and post them at each other. Its fucking over.

62263722
>>62263521
yeah, the reality is that does not qualify you as above average intelligence. You should have realized that long ago. The fact you even didn't for a portion of your life actually means you fed yourself with goyslop, uber 30$ meals with indian poop and ass hairs mixed in it. Hence why it's important to know your age to assess your own retardation.
Surely socrate wasn't the only individual to ask questions. Faggot.

62263732
>>62262760
Just drive an uninsured car without a phone

62263808
>>62263732
quintessentially based.

62263811
>>62263722
This is just embarrassing to read. You’re a retard. “Muh ass hairs”. You’re fucking gay and I don’t care to hear about your fetishes.

62263897
>>62263811
how much did you spend on goyslop before having this sudden flash of genius?
This is what i would be embarassed about. Also embarassing, the fact you gueninely think cooking meals is a sign of high intelligence. If you set the bar very low, that can be i guess.

62263900
>>62263602
Anon it’s time to wake up. America is like a carnival. Where the carnies are politicians and corporations looking to trick you into fake games that take all your money. It’s a predatory nation. It’s not even a nation. It’s a couple corporations. Your only hope is to work either on your own very hard, or hopefully pool resources with family. Basically look at how immigrants live. Multiple families in a house. You have to act like you lost everything and that everything is rigged to abuse you. Because it is.

62263931
>>62262449
Splurging on chips defeats the purpose. Just eat baked dark meat chicken with plain rice.

62264055
>>62263573
I also own a house and eat beef whenever I want but I'm not a loser faggot like you who contributes nothing to the conversation.
You don't even know how to talk to people and give them the wrong advice. I bet you tell people they can afford a house if they drop the beef.

62264078
>>62263931
You won't afford a house just because you stop eating chips. They are lying to you.

62264089
>>62262449
Fast food is a gigantic grift now.
They're draining what they can from low impulse control / high time preference slobs while their business model still works.
Unless you're on the road, there's no excuse for fast food anymore. It doesn't taste good, it's not healthy, and it's the same price as a normal takeout joint.

That said, the restaurant industry as a whole is a status grift for women. You don't even get good service anywhere short of fine dining. The demand is for people to say they went to X and snap a few selfies/food pictures, not to actually enjoy the meal together and hang out with their group.
I can't remember the last time I actually finished a plate before the waitstaff was trying to push the bill on us.

62264122
Caleb is fat therefore his opinion/advice is discarded

62264124
>MAGA is telling you to eat like a slave so we can continue funding wars for Israel
>the same people that squealed like pigs a few years ago because eggs were pricey

62264174
>just eat poisonous fake food goyslop, goyim
>real food is reserved for us, not you

62264324
>>62263155
Yes its especially important while developing.

62264336
>>62264324
It's about humiliation. My expensive food isn't as good unless I make you eat garbage.

62264558
>>62262607
I agree with you anon. Boomers are boomers, don’t need to beat that dead horse. But routinely eating out is retarded on many levels.

62264577
>>62264124
this lol
fucking pathetic

62264580
>>62263206
Post body fatass

62264583
>>62262454
I love Dave Ramsey. Even more than loving him, I love when poor, stupid zoomers talk about how he's a retard and doesn't know anything. Then I ask them how a retard boomer like Dave becomes worth hundreds of millions of dollars while they can't afford a running car.

62264663
>>62262607
I think my dad was 19 years old when the gold standard was abandoned. Crazy what boomers got away with.

62264675
yes, you deserve to have fast food delivered to your door. yes, you deserve to have it chewed and dropped into your mouth.

62264691
>>62264583
I can afford a running car doe

item.title: FIRE is mental illness — 210 replies — 317.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
FIRE is mental illness

Open thread • Replies: 210 • Updated: 2026-05-23 00:47 UTC

OP

No woman, no kids, $25k YEARLY spend.
You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s and spend the rest of your life relaxing. What is wrong with modern men?

Early replies (first 3)

62259938
>>62259935
Keep slaving away goyman

62259945
>>62259935
Nice bait thread faggot

62259968
>>62259935
You can't really afford to marry on FIRE because one divorce ruins a decade+ of saving and then you have to work again. If a woman finds out you're FIRE she will absolutely divorce rape you too since the wealth disparity between you and her is so great she'll walk away with a ludicrous amount of money.

Huge downside of FIRE, you can never marry.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263540
>>62260375
>warm hole
the point is to have kids and grow old with someone. You know, actual fulfillment instead of niggermaxxing to instant gratification and being miserable at 40+

62263557
>>62262942
wouldn't you feel bad about being a deadbeat dad? If it's a girl she'll become a whore guaranteed. If a son, he'll likely join a gang. Seen it many times.

62263591
So many old married losers in here

62263605
>>62263355
>Go on, oh wise one. Show us which states and where this has happened.
Most states, but especially red states with “muh family protector” laws on the books that basically means the man is legally required to care for his ex-wife. West Virginia is one of the worst offenders.

Look at all the ways a pre-nup can be nullified, and look at how vague the wording is. For example, a pre-nup can be thrown out if it is “overly one-sided” such as a man, who owns the majority of assets, retaining all his assets. Of course, all pre-nups are one sided because women own no equity ever, but if a judge says, “Mhm, dis here is one-sided nigga.” You’re done.

Also, the judge can decide that your wife “signed under duress.”

Or any other million of scenarios where the pre-nup gets nullified in court.

Once again, you are a fucking retard and should shut the fuck up.

62263636
The average age of internet users is going up. So funny reading the shit of normie men on reddit and here sometimes larping as old and wise.

62263653
>>62263636
So much relationship advice on Reddit is just 35 year old, fat fuck dudes saying
>When I was in college, I never got laid, but now I’m 35, and I found a retired whore single mom.
>So I heckin’ stepped up and became the betabux provider I was meant to be, unlike you chudds
Then it gets 20,000 updoots.

62263797
>>62259980
This.
No way they kept their expenses that low, while owning a house (so presumably in the 'burbs) throughout their 20's and had a life at the same time.
They're not going to have the social skills or personality to attract a decent girl and the wealth disparity will absolutely attract women planning to run off with half of it after five years.
>>62262729
The point of marriage is to share a life, grow together, and have a family with someone. Not to basically be bf/gf at the ripe age of 40, except with legal liabilities, while pretending there's a real bond.

62263812
>>62262791
This. If you meet a girl in your early 20's, marry by mid/late 20's, that's different. That's authentic.
This new paradigm of "not supposed to marry until you have half a mil net worth at 35+" is not what marriage was for nearly all of human history. The relationships are way less likely to be as strong and the social and financial liabilities it creates for men are nowhere close to the reward.

62263815
what's so great about kids? The amount of propaganda lately is crazy.

62263849
>>62263797
I’ll never understand the whole dink thing. just pointless to get married if you don’t plan on having kids.

62263988
>>62263605
>ask for specifics
>get vague references
>screenshot from fucking Australia
Kill yourself nigger
>Or any other million of scenarios where the pre-nup gets nullified in court.
Then show us two of them

62263992
>>62263988
you can't write a contract that violates the law.

so any time a prenup disagrees with divorce law, the prenup gets thrown out. It happens all the time.

62264003
>>62263428
>$10k or $100k
These are not the same.
But I agree with the sentiment. There's points in life where you gotta wake up and get your shit together.
>>62263605
Common Law Marriage was the most insane fucking thing when I first heard of it. In some states, if you've been dating a girl for 10 years, you legally end up considered married and have to pay shit like alimony if you break up.
It's the sort of thing that sounds like it was thought up in the 1800's, but nobody's repealed it.

62264007
>>62263653
The third person in the threesome is also another guy.

62264012
>>62263988
Not my fault you’re a retard. Why would I waste my time spoonfeeding a retard? You’re an incel anyways. Why do you care about prenups? You’ve never had sex.

62264027
>>62264003
>Common Law Marriage was the most insane fucking thing when I first heard of it. In some states, if you've been dating a girl for 10 years, you legally end up considered married and have to pay shit like alimony if you break up.
Yep, people don’t know how fucked up family law is until it starts dickslapping them in the face. What’s even funnier is when you find out that your 12 year old son actually isn’t biologically yours, but, for whatever myriad of reasons, the court doesn’t care and you gotta pay child support anyways. For a lot of states in a lot of circumstances, it actually doesn’t matter if “your” son came out of your balls or not. Your wife fucked the mailman and got caught? Sorry buddy, but that boy is still legally yours cuz reasons.

62264028
>>62259935
You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s and spend the rest of your life relaxing.

Why not?
>

62264045
>>62263557
Why would he be a deadbeat? If he leaves, he can send them like 300 dollars a month and they will be okay. Also pay for their college, etc

62264297
>>62263178
why do people just larp and completely invent stories on this site? is it some kind of attention seeking thing from an unresolved toddler need?

truly disgusting lot on this board. i think i won't be coming back.

62264345
>>62259935
sorry, your thread has been noticed

62264378
>>62259935
This is not the person I would mock, he actually did fucking make it. I have no idea how you get 12 years in work make near 2 million and also a fully paid house jesus christ wow.

You should mock me, I was 39, decided I wasn't wasting my 40s in a deadend job but I had 400K saved up and just said fuck it tried to invest in dividend stocks and live in my parents house they kicked me out so I tried to day trade with 200K and seven years later I am finally broke and need a job but I got a super shitty resume and no recent job history or references who remember who I am.

I am near 50 and am pretty fucked. Trying to not kill myself. Might do a bootcamp for tech with last 10K or go try a masters or do the grind Walmart -- Office -- go back to banking.

62264379
>>62264045
the most important thing about a dad is spending time with the kids, not sending 300 a month. The girl will be a whore and son turn trans without that presence. Look at Elon's kid.

62264434
>>62264379
> the most important thing about a dad is spending time with the kids
Not true. Grew up with really rich kids. Money is more important. Only brokie fathers think time with kids is more important.

62264547
>>62263992
Yeah. But you absolutely CAN structure a legal one that lets you split premarital assets. That’s been my whole point. You’re comparing apples and railroad ties.

62264551
>>62264012
>still no proof
Keep going. This is fun.
>never had sex
Woman argument. You’ve lost and it’s clear.

62264565
>>62264379
The kid will have their mom's parents, grandparents, aunt and uncles, etc. That stuff can happen regardless, even in the West with two loving parents. And he can stay in the country and visit them from time to time if he really wants.

62264595
>>62259935
>You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s and spend the rest of your life relaxing.
Kek, why not? I'm on the same exact path. Life is extremely cozy. Fuck this faggot society

62264600
>>62259968
>Huge downside of FIRE, you can never marry.
what kind of faggot do you have to be to unironically write this shit? If you even consider getting married in le current year, you are a wheelchair bound, drool tier fucking retard.

62264605
>>62260997
based

62264672
>>62264595
You’re supposed to slave away like everyone else.
lol.
“Society” is like 95% worker bees with no choice but to toll.

item.title: Anon, its my bday today Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in th… — 51 replies — 204.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anon, its my bday today Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in th…

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-05-23 01:26 UTC

OP

Anon, its my bday today
Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in the bank, had a successful career but then pivoted to make a startup and lost shit ton of money and time in the process. Not sure what to do anymore. Basically going through the dark night of the soul.

Now I'm here trying to find a tech job in a fucking US to not die on the street. You are, as usual, my only real friend.

Tell me something nice or not.

Early replies (first 3)

62261420
>>62261414
>Now I'm here trying to find a tech job in a fucking US
Are you a foreigner? Is this a LARP?

62261422
You did good

62261428
>>62261414
Your life can turn around in a week easy. New job, new girl, market pumps, whatever. Don't be so down anon you don't know what is around the corner. Also you're only early 30s, you're young as fuck, you have to live as long as you already have all over again before you hit mid 60s, just think how long that truly is. Stop worrying and enjoy your life you fag.

Happy Birthday, enjoy the magic trick.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62262803
>>62261414
30y old.
You are baby.
Keep calm, enjoy your life

62262809
>>62262752
>I'm le victim
No just stop being an asshat. You're free to say what you want and we can call you douchebag with our own freedom of speech.

62262866
>>62262164
this is one of the saddest things I've ever read. When did you last have sex you fucking tranny freak

62262905
>>62261414
go work in a warehouse

62262915
>>62261414
Check out buildnow. 6 to 8 week program and you'll have a borderline guaranteed 80k a year data center job. Its not over fren.

62262933
>>62261512
bro im literal fucking developer, and I would get paid 200k+ in the US instead of fucking 80k euros in stupid europe.
plus taxes rape me and we don't have AC here, stfu. i hate you faggots
>>62261414
happy nigger day OP, try to milk the states, the money printer is going to ran out and we'll be full serfs forever. better get grinding, pray to God for strength and you'll be okay. Literally you cannot be poor if you're smart, but yes wagecucking sucks

62263921
>>62262809
ok then stop crying about me using my 1st amendment right ont his us based website.

62263940
>>62263921
I mean like you said there's nobody here, it's okay to not be an ass, believe me there's people in my life I'd love to tell them to off themselves but people are more fragile than we usually are.
All I'm saying is tell the /smg/ and other general fags to fuck off instead.

62263942
>>62261512
Irish here. Because I went from making 52k€ to 200k USD by moving here.

62263944
>>62262866
Glad you liked it.
I was banging an 18 year old last year but got tired of it.
She had a kid already right after

62263952
>>62263942
but now you owe double taxes typically, or if you go back home, and cost of living in the US is more than likely higher than euros
I should have been a software fag, instead im a sickfag
this place is insanely expensive, how you enjoying the US?
Btw they just converted most gas to e-15 overnight watch it with your car, it can slag certain engines, this place is going to shit fast.

62263962
>>62263952
>Owe double taxes
No I don’t. Ireland and the USA have tax treaties. The cost of living where I live (east coast) is high but does not scale to eat up all of my income, otherwise I wouldn’t have moved here.
I am thoroughly enjoying the USA and wish I could stay but unfortunately my company are a bunch of cunts and don’t sponsor people. Been grand so far. Despite all of the stereotypes I work with geniuses in my field and there’s not that many turbo fatties.

62263984
what was the startup idea?

62264000
>>62263962
I figured you would like it, i have a friend Im trying to convince to move here, I'd sponsor him though I'm sure his work would.

If you get a chance to come back shoot for the midwest, Cerner has a lot of software jobs though might have changed names, cost of living is quite a bit less and still a chance to get a good home for decent pricing.

62264015
>>62264000
I’m not a software engineer, I’m a chemical engineer. Also, I’m supposed to move to the Midwest for the last year of my visa. Missouri.

62264068
>>62264015
There ya go I live in KC, there's a bayer plant I believe not too far off from me.

62264074
>>62264015
Also spray me with your poisons mister.

62264117
>>62261414
so you had one. stop whining you made your choices

62264167
>>62261501
worst cat picture

62264433
>>62263944
>banging an 18 year old last year
Schizo head canon until proven otherwise

62264610
>>62261414
You are a baby at 30

62264632
>>62261414
K-K-K-K-K-K-KWAB

62264651
>>62264074
>>62264068
No way. We should become bros when I move there.

62264653
Buy a pressure washer

62264665
>>62261414
You sound like a normal person.
The average person with a “wife” or “gf” are in a desperate position to keep their partner and has no leverage over the relationship anyways.
The average salary is $65k and is heavily pulled up by high earners.

62264676
>>62261414
even through the darkest nights, self improve. Focus on becoming better and growing more knowledge and experience. It will be the only thing you can take with you after death. Then you get to become a part of me. You all will as I will you

62264696
>>62264651
lol might be related I'm irish on both sides of my fathers side then again on my mothers, O'Noonans/Picts.
If you get your citizenship housing is still very cheap here and plenty of small cozy towns with 400-900 people only an hour or so from the big city.

62264705
>>62264433
lol she was a depressed black girl I met doordashing, was stressful due to one her being so young, and two her mom was my age lol.

62264708
>>62264433
I'd have to drop her off around the corner, wasn't illegal obviously but if her dad and mom had found out I was their age I'm fairly sure the dad might have shot me.
Luckily nobody ever caught wind of it, but she kept doing LSD with her friends and then call me asking to drive her away because shes having bad trips, I wasn't into it, I pushed her to date a guy she liked growing up with because it was the right thing to do, I didn't however expect her to get pregnant immediately, oh well she has some pretty bad beef curtains, but sadly think it was natural.

62264726
Sorry bros if I don't respond I got a terrible migraine today it happens a lot to me, but I got some dino nuggies and gonna sleep after.
It's interesting now when i get migrianes which might be stemming from the tumor in my fucking neck I feel this invisible crown on my head.
Almost like wearing a baseball cap except it's invisible the sensation of wearing a crown from my skull.
Then usually mind bending pain and nausea, once it happened to me in 2023 and I think my kidney was infected but I saw Ophainm and a green eye eminating from the middle of it looking at me.
Was the only hallucination I've ever experienced, and some out of body experiences during a bone marrow biopsy where I could see them drilling into my spine.
If I survive much longer I'm going to be shocked this surgery should have killed my ass.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3hnCT4yx0TM

item.title: >*predicts the price of BTC in your path* — 20 replies — 80.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>*predicts the price of BTC in your path*

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-05-23 01:16 UTC

OP

>*predicts the price of BTC in your path*

Early replies (first 3)

62263829
Well, except for today, wtf

You're supposed to go up today, you stupid coin

62264034
>>62261213
literal meme lines

62264038
>>62263829
>trick algos into thinking the price will go up so they buy
>dump into them with size
thanks for playing!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62264048
>>62264034
I promise I'm working on a 85-IQ friendly version

62264064
>it doesnt work
>im making an 85 iq version
good you can finally pretend to understand

62264083
>>62264064
>78% hit rate since 2024
>nails trend for 2 months
>one date of noise (so far)
>"it doesn't work"

62264123
>>62264083
>youre still poor
?

62264146
>>62264123
>quoting me calling you something I only strongly implied

62264150
>>62264146
>you're still poor
?

62264159
>>62264150
>quoting me calling you something I only strongly implied

62264163
>>62261213
When and at what price will the next 2 year low be

62264178
>>62264163
No idea. The outputs are based on a physics simulation that predicts likely market pivot points, and the output starts to blur about 5 weeks out so I run it in 4-week chunks. "Buy on green arrows/sell on red arrows/derisk on yellow diamonds" has been pretty reliable, especially when you add liquidity-based confirmation/invalidation (red x's or green checks)

Historically speaking? Early-mid June

62264197
>>62264178
>”I have no idea what I’m talking about and my indicator is unreliable at best!”

Nice blog.

62264209
>>62264197
>consistent ~80% hitrate since 2024, including through the war in which random Presidential tweets can knock 5% off orange coin's value
>unreliable

62264602
>>62264209
Wow so 80 percent of the time it works all the time? Shut up and take my money!!!!1!!!

62264608
>>62263829
they operate on a higher level, they have all the obvious models and they play against them

62264640
>>62261213
So double X is confirmation? Looks good but don't you keep getting buy signals all the way down?

>>62264209
This can still be valuable as a tool for high income people who just average down.

62264678
>>62264640
>Looks good but don't you keep getting buy signals all the way down?
The system generates 4 weeks of likely buy/sell points using a schizo physics simulation, then close to the date confirms or invalidates them (X or check) using 2 basic liquidity momentum indicators. This month's chart, for example, was generated May 4. The combined physics-liquidity system predicts market pivots with about 80% accuracy, which is insane for something forecasting that far out. The demo strategy that just trades BTC once or twice a week with 1x lev is up ~700% since 2024

The lighter colored triangles are hybrid liquidity-physics signals. Getting close to a predicted buy/sell point (48 hours before), strong momentum on the liquidity side can advance or delay a buy/sell point by 24 hours. Strong bullish liquidity advances buys and delays sells, strong bearish liquidity advances sells and delays buys. Usually when you get a string of hybrid-physics signals like that, it's smart to layer in orders on each day and get heavier toward the end of the range.

The yellow diamonds are points where you get sudden "surprise" accelerations or trend reversals. The model is really good at picking them out, if you look at the chart.

Of course, sucks to be me since it looks like I've posted here right before the system got it wrong lol

62264688
>>62264678
So are you running it in production or just simulating it? Good job bro, this is cool.

62264707
>>62264688
>So are you running it in production or just simulating it? Good job bro, this is cool.
Thanks Anon! It's in production, web dashboard with live indicators and history back to December 2024, and I've been posting on Twitter since last October. It's taken a few years to develop and tune the model.

There are lots of physics-based trade models out there, modeling demand as particle density and stuff like that, but as far as I can tell this is the only public one that can predict market pivots weeks in advance. I have noticed that about 90% of the time, a predicted buy/sell that falls on a weekend gets frontrun on the last trading day before, which makes me suspect some institutions have figured it out. Which, now that I think about it, should've included the upcoming May 25th Sell being on Memorial Day

item.title: >US government to invest $2 billion in quantum computing companies >Quantum stocks soars >He still haven't bought in NGM… — 17 replies — 10.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>US government to invest $2 billion in quantum computing companies >Quantum stocks soars >He still haven't bought in NGM…

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-05-22 23:45 UTC

OP

>US government to invest $2 billion in quantum computing companies
>Quantum stocks soars
>He still haven't bought in
NGMI!

Early replies (first 3)

62258925
>>62258361
>buy AFTER it soars
Never change, /piz/

62258931
>>62258361
State run capitalism is based and communist pilled. Buying more Dell stock!

62258940
While I'm by no means an insider, I have had the pleasure of talking with various people in the quantum field recently. It's still a good time to buy in, but some kind of ETF or tracker, not specific companies - because it's simply too unclear who will win out. But the industry as a whole will be going places. Probably not as far as the AI stuff because it will have use cases that are too specific, but it is coming.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62258962
>the only stocks that perform are the ones that get government gibs
so this.......... is the power............................................................... of the free market........................................ whoa.............................................

62259014
>>62258361
>$2 billion
Holy Moly !! A couple of B-nuts just hit the Quantum market, the surge might even be detectable, if you do x10 leverage right now you can get an easy 5% ROI from this trade!
Thanks for posting this OP!!

62259775
>>62259014
First off, this was enough to get my quantum stocks out of the red and give me a profit of 22% in a single day. It was a decent pump. Secondly, $2B is nothing compared to what will come. Stop being a faggot and join in

62259789
>>62258940
>because it's simply too unclear who will win out.
I've been feeling like this is probably true. Every quantum company right now seems to be trying a completely different apporach from each other. Unfortunately I already injected too much money in individual companies and can't get into ETFs atm.

62259797
>>62258361
It's a bubble.

62259803
>>62259797
Doesn't matter even if it is one. This time I'm early and I can make a shit ton of money.

62260094
Reminder that quantum has no path to profitability ever.

62260383
>>62260094
Elaborate

62260391
>>62258962
Been that way for a while, just more obvious routes of handing out the gibs now. Amazon, for example, got a sweetheart deal with the post office in 2012 that meant they effectively paid ~$1 per package no matter the size or weight, anywhere from 1/10 to 1/40th of normal shipping costs.

62260968
Quantum computing wont happen, but even if it does, the only significant financial consequence is btc going to 0.

62261205
I picked like 6 quantum stocks and tossed 5k into each. Seem to be doing ok, I feel like IONQ is performing the best and maybe Xanadu or quantum emotion is performing the worst. Got lucky and was holding dwave too so I caught some of this pump and the whole space is kinda just pumping on the news so it's nice.

62261829
>>62259797
Its worse, its communism

62263923
Quantum "computing" is the biggest tech grifter scam imaginable, it's literally infinite-energy-out-of-nothing level of delusion.
>duuuude what if computers could do 0 and 1 at once whoooaaaaa they would solve all calculations instantly noooo waaaaayyyyyy because quckbits are entangled realllyyyyyy like becausee we might be in simulatioooon duuuuudeee
Stoned tech bros came up with dumbest idea possible and somehow got everyone fooled it will work if they just let them build billion dollar "computers". But I guess it gets VC money flowing, so feel free to jump on the bandwagon. Just remember to not be a sucker, get out before the grift stops.

62264548
>>62258361
2 billion isn't much when the government invested 50b+ into the chips & science act.

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-05-23 01:04 UTC

OP

Two pizzas aren’t on the table; they’re sitting at it. This was a deliberate act of rub, clearly signalling to the right crowd. BTW, where are these kids now? Because I can find his recent photos, but zero photos of *his* kids.

62261169
>>62261166
Still more valuable than anything else bitcoin has ever done

62261183

62261194
>>62261183
ew

62261207
>>62261166
haha yeah wouldn't that be funny. lucky me even back then it was impossibly hard to mine so i have none

62261263
>>62261166
bro those kids are 20+ years old they don't live at home anymore dumb fuck, at that age parents get a picture or two a year if lucky. less if they live out of town.

62261274
>>62261263
That dad is 100% gay you can see it on his face and his faggy kids, similar to that jewish actor Sabretooth whos son was sucking on his bike handle like it was a sucker, now he's a famous trans femboy.

62261301
>>62261166

62261391
>>62261166

62261396

62261400
>>62261166

62261517

62261678

62261685

62261687
>>62261517
Not everyone broadcasts their life's online you zoomer fuck. There are literally zero images of me on the internet outside of some old Facebook friends from 10 years ago and I have been online since 95

62262003

Ouch. So you're telling me he spent nearly a billion on two crappy pizzas? I hope he kept some and didn't blow his full stack on this purchase. Does anyone know if he's worth millions today?

62262910
>>62261274

fuck off, losers

62263805
>>62261166

"be a good little moon boy, don't do anything useful or productive, dont figure shit out. buy moon coin and watch the line go up and down like a good little boy. don't forget to wonder who Satoshi Nakamoto is every once an awhile to switch things up." literally go die

62262023

62262030
>>62262010
Well I sold 1k to realize some profits for the probable reckoning coming in days to week to months at the latest, but still have 4k stinks. Hopefully can turn into somethin nice. Little upset realized some of my lowest cost basis lots but I wanted to take some profits. My main concern is moving to a state without carry forward capital loss balance year over year, otherwise I’d continue realizing the bad remaining lot buys ($15/$16 range)and have a nice bank to offset gains down the road

62262054

62262062

62262285

62262393

>BTC takes a dive

62262397

62263186

62263224

62263238

62263256
>>62263238
Bro cmon, be honest, we're at literally at 0.00012 sats, we got raped by Sirgay and it's over. We have lost, it's just another shitcoin and it will never recover in any meaningful way, while king shitcoin has a chance of making new aths.

62263278
>>62263256

Fucking how?

We got raped by 6 years of Bitcoin dumping on every single Link pump and announcement.

62263287
>>62263278
Are you retarded?
I literally bagholded link from .00169 sats to the shit it is now at 0.00012, i would had made it having sold all my Link and converted to BTC, now I'm a bagholder and definitely selling all my unstaked shit if it reaches 20-25

62263293
>>62263287

62263337
>>62263293

Link has failed for more and I'm tired of pretending it hasn't. Build rewards? Staking? All shit same as link, fuck that fat fucking scammer. Satoshi nakamoto my ass

62263385

item.title: NTDOY — 58 replies — 10.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
NTDOY

Open thread • Replies: 58 • Updated: 2026-05-22 19:46 UTC

OP

Currently Nintendo stock is extremely mispriced. All the short-term doom and gloom is priced in, ignoring the company's tremendous long-term upside. While it's not some 10x your money in a week meme coin, at this point it's a sleeper stock to hold you should know about.

Early replies (first 3)

62259388
>>62259371
its not mispriced. they make shitty games for 80+$. no one wants to buy their crap because its shit.

62259405
>NTDOY baggie
KWAB

62259407
>>62259371
not misspriced
no point in shilling your bags here btw
>>62259388
this and console era is coming to an end. Future will be only game stations with steam like platforms. retards still go for the ps5 by some sort of pavlovian reflex. it's just a standardized computer with a standardized controller. Nintendo shined for a while 30 years ago now it has become so cringe i can't stand their adds like wtf is even this shit

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62259884
>>62259808
Video games aren't dead. Consoles and reliance on proprietary IPs is. Gaming continues in phones for casuals and PC indies for the hardcore crowd. It's funny because had you invested in phones and social media instead of gaming companies since the early 2010s you'd be massively better off than an investment in Nintendo. Who's talking about "it'll be different this time"?

And anyway, yes, the world is different in 2026 than it was in 1980. Investment is about the future, not staring at previous success and insisting it'll happen again. What is Nintendo doing that could possibly replicate their boom in the 1980s?

62259900
>>62259828
It’s fixable, but will it be fixed? So far, nothing indicates that Nintendo takes the problem seriously, especially with the "no games" problem. Looks like Nintendo will just release four or five decent AAA games through the entire console’s lifespan (one Mario, one Zelda or whatever, and these are not even announced) and then call it a day.

62259983
>>62259371
Why would people be hungry for buying an ever increasing in price console (due to RAM) with zero new Zelda or Mario on it?

62260004
>>62259814
Dude, SW2 is a stop gap filler console until the real one (with a new hardware gimmick) wil be ready, the big games (mainline mario/zelda) will come out very late to be also used as launch titles for the next.
This is wii u/gba/3ds all over again.

62260032
>>62259371
>making this thread again
Please god nuke the third world

62260035
>>62259371
I agree. Not because of vidya, but because of Pokémon cards. The market cap of all PSA10 graded Pokémon cards is over $75B. Nintendo's market cap os only $53B. It makes no sense that the company that makes the cards is worth so much less than the cards themselves.

62260053
>>62260004
Nintendo could actually get away with it (releasing a Switch 3, 4, 5, etc. forever) by not being so retarded and underwhelming… Instead they will be forced to invent something else that may or may not be successful.

62260188
>>62259371
Thanks

62260304
>>62259371
agreed p/e is slurpable, nintendo aint going away

62260335
>>62259884
already priced in

62260390
Apple is apple

62260407
I bought a Rog ALLY X and it’s 100000x better than the switch I had for my son. You know the target audience? My kid uses the Ally to watch YouTube play actual fun games. He cares more about Spider-Man than bing bing wahoo slop. Nintendo failed to capture the audience by marketing to childless manchildren just like Disney Adults. They have no market share and sell an inferior product. Pokémon still looks and plays like an indie game from 2005. (lol)

Enjoy your bags tendie you get what you deserve.

62260606
>>62260407

62261314
Sorry about your hopes of pumping your bags OP, but I'll just leave this here...
>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=luiKV1nHB1w

62261355
>>62259371
The switch 2 is overpriced. People who have money don't even know what it is. It also demotes the value of the switch one, which partially went subscription based model. So it was bad business design.

62261416
Tell me the last time they ever release a ground breaking software or hardware? The new pokemon is not a cashgrab.

62261518
anyway, you know when a retard here shill some stock:
1/ he is clueless no amount of shiling here will pump it not even 0.01%

2/therefore it's a bad pick

it's cringe.last retard shilled mc donald like it was some secret gem. The real blackpill is whatever gets shilled here don't buy it or even better sell it if you have some (pokemon cards, random crypto that miraculously pumped x10, nintengoy stocks, mc goynald stock, whatever)

62261624
>>62260035
>It makes no sense that the company that makes the cards is worth so much less than the cards themselves.
What psychogenic kush are you smoking? It makes a ton of sense. By your logic, a goldsmith can't have created a masterpiece work that he has sold 20 years ago but which is now recognized to be more valuably than his entire shop.

62261625
Value Trap 2: Electric Boogaloo

62261640
>>62259371
I agree. They are the one last big truly JP dev remaining, huge franchise value that's only getting better, the only one console with exclusives, ninety-something % of the serious handheld business with proper customer attachment, JP approach to quality as opposed to deadlines, no DEI, success with theme park now expanding, huge success with the films now.
No reason not to own their stock, I think it's a good 50% undervalued.

62261642
>2009
>Nintendo has suffered a drawdown of 50%
>ZOMG invest in Nintendo!!
>keeps dropping
>10 years to reach the position you entered

Yeah nah, I know a correction when I see it.

62261677
>>62261625
kek.
What is your average OP?
Buying this above 2 is like giving to a charity

62262033
>>62261314
Already priced in

62262739
6months performance : - 45%
1 month perfomance : -12%
today's perfomance : - 0.47%

wow troontendgoy really IS daw new millionaire maker!

62263011
>>62259371

62263036
>>62263011
Also they know how to pirate.

62263054
>>62261640

Holy shit lmaoo, it's so cringe in vidya DEI is still a hot topic while all other sectors of the economy have moved on 2 years ago. Drenched with pozz.

62263652
>>62262739
>anon argues against buying dips
I reckon you're one of those faggots who buys high and sells low

62263715
>>62259371
People aren't interested in bing bing wahoo anymore.

62263737
Nintendo even fucked over collectors with the Switch 2, I just can't justify buying physical games when they're not even on cart, this shit will have zero resale value in 10 years when the servers are no longer around. And buying digital is retarded unless they're extremely discounted.

item.title: why does this keep happening — 19 replies — 9.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
why does this keep happening

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-05-22 23:27 UTC

OP

>Link pumps to $10
>BTC instantly takes a nosedive

Why is Link not allowed to go above $10?

Early replies (first 3)

62263473
because fuck you, stinkie
it really all boils down to that
the entire crypto market exists JUST TO FUCK YOU STINKIES OVER
how does that make you feel
it makes me feel pic related

62263519
>>62263473
hey it's the dick guy

62263588
But Sirgay said they've decoupled from crypto prices

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263631
>>62263230
The question is why, why use BTC with 200x mcap to suppress LINK

62263646
>>62263631
SN=SN and he's not your friend.

62263816
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM
link

62263870
>>62263230
Take your meds, its literally just following the btc chart. All the alt charts are the same.
Btc pumps = alts pump
Btc dumps = alts dump

Idk why you retards think link is the one causing btc to pump and dump when its the other way around

62264096
>>62263870
Sure thing rabbi

62264135
Coinbase constantly has positive notifications sent out for link, but the price is always shidding and farding.
For example: pic related

62264172
>>62263870
>ts literally just following the btc chart.
Bitcoin was crabbing, and the second Link pumped and hit $10, Bitcoin dumped.

Are you blind.

62264180
>>62264172
sweetie you forgot your medicine :}

62264354
>>62263230
because you're retarded enough to think that BTC is dumping because of LINK's movement rather than LINK is dumping because of BTC's movement.

62264389
>>62263473
why does this bitch have such a pointy schnoz, is she a kike?
t. link investoor (newfag)

62264394
>>62263870
>Btc pumps = alts pump
>Btc dumps = alts dump
More like
Btc pumps = alts dump
Btc dumps = alts dump
simple as

62264410
>>62264354
No he understands that BTC dumps, to drag link down, before it pumps too high

Just DCA anons, they'll unleash it when they're ready

62264427
>>62264410
Wrong you dumb link nigger. EVERYTHING dumps when BTC dumps. Every single coin has TA levels called resistances and supports. Shitcoins like LINK won't break its resistance without permission from BTC (permission being BTC breaking through its own resistance level) so LINK will just sit at resistance waiting on BTC's permission to go higher. If BTC dumps then LINK will dump without ever breaking the current resistance because it is a shitcoin and BTC controls movement.

Your inability to understand this is why you're poor and still bagholding absolute garbage after all these years. Hope this helps.

62264474
>>62264427
retard

62264483
>>62264474
stay poor bagholder

62264512
>>62264474
we'll never let u live it down stinker
you lost

62252856

keep stacking brothers

62253216
>>62252856

62253224
>>62252856

62253228
>>62252856

62255610
>>62254676

item.title: HODL and buy more BTC. — 77 replies — 8.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
HODL and buy more BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 77 • Updated: 2026-05-22 16:40 UTC

OP

If you still don’t own any Bitcoin yet, anon what the hell are you waiting for?

>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway. I’d rather have BTC long term than let my money rot in a savings account.

Early replies (first 3)

62245757
i get 5btc later for cheaper but thanks for the advice!

62245760
>>62245741
Too eqrly but yeah and avoid cex or at least take it out as fast as u can!

62246438
>>62245757
How much BTC are you holding right now anon?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257679
>>62246878
It was decided that BTC would never scale. Self custody is impossible on BTC. Go ahead and try it. I swear when I make it I am going to hunt small blockers with a rifle.

62257680
it's boomer coin

62258573
>>62257679
will your cut your d?

62258577
>>62257680
you have zero bitcoin

62258754
>>62257223
Where is he now

62258775
>>62257679
nonsense. It's all in your head

62258793
>>62258754

62259397
>>62245757
lets hold hands and buy in Oct

62259745
>>62259397
What's happening in October?

62260090
>>62259745
He’s buying

62261050
>>62257679
BTC infrastructure is basically trying to solve that balance now: preserving self custody while making native BTC more usable across broader financial systems. Maybe you’re just not updated yet.

62261057
>>62252472
Buy btc for many reasons anon.

62261131
>>62257675
*sends 5 million dollars worth of gold across the world in 5 minutes for a nominal fee*

62261260
>>62261050
It's kinda scary to go deeper with that
>>62261131
Plus big chance for theft

62261264
>>62258793
Hello I'm here

62261340
>>62257392
>>62261260
Nothing wrong with being cautious, just don’t treat all BTCFi the same. Big names like a16zcrypto, Ledger, GoMining and others wouldn’t even touch it if everything was complete garbage.

62261342
>>62252488
50k? Nooo way

62261452
>>62260090
100k by October

62261462
>>62261452
no chance
this will count as the summer of the big dump

62261476
>>62261462
Your opinion doesn't matter to me

62261608
>>62261340
Why do people still not know about this?
Better to explore and understand the TBV direction early before launch.

62261618
>>62261462
How do you know?

62261632
>>62252488
Poor mindset

62261641
>>62261131
Fee: $20000

62262278
>>62259397
Buy altcoins too

62262820
>>62261608
No need to rush. People will figure it out eventually. You can already see more attention shifting toward DeFi outside the usual Ethereum-only lane anyway.

62262829
>>62261131
And people still wonder why institutions keep accumulating BTC.

62262834
>>62256924
Depends on their choice tho

62262852
Bitcoin is the future

62262893
>>62262278
>Hbar
>Link
>Rave
>Sei

item.title: How much can you invest into tax free portfolios in your country? — 22 replies — 5.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
How much can you invest into tax free portfolios in your country?

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-05-22 21:18 UTC

OP

How much can you invest into tax free portfolios in your country? (not including pensions)
>UK
20k per year

Early replies (first 3)

62261497
>>62261457
$7,500 in Roth IRAs
$24,500 in Roth 401k
>USA

There are others but I'm not looking it up.

62261502
>>62261457
bold of you to assume that the uk wont simply change the rules once enough brown communists are in parliament

62261505
>>62261457
goymany
0

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62261507
>>62261457
All portfolios are tax-free in my country, lol

62261513
>>62261457
>UK
>20k per year
Plus £9,000 in Junior ISA's.

62261530
>>62261497
>$24,500 in Roth 401k
I said not including pensions

62261532
>>62261507
Which country?

62261534
>>62261530
401ks aren't pensions. They're fundamentally different.

62262204
>>62261534
Ok, I should have said not including retirement plans

62262371
>>62261457
in Brazil the government sometimes would let you invest in fund with some of your social security money... in a fund that holds 1 stock and has 2% management fee

it's all so tiresome

62262392
>>62262371
What's the stock?

62263042
>>62261532
Luxembourg, no tax after 6 months of holding

62263260
>>62263042
noice. isnt it boring there tho

62263276
>>62261457
0, in 2028 I'm gonna get raped with 36% unrealized gains on all investments with the almighty generous allowance of 1.8k euros tax free per year if I have gains, kek.
Nobody cares, just bring more infinite niggers since I'm leaving this shithole.

62263279
>>62262392
Macaco

62263298
>>62263276
You’re Dutch, aren’t you?

62263317
>>62263298
Nah fuck them, i live in the Netherlands but I'm not a gay faggot kike.
Also white, before any indians think I'm one of them.
Literally pussy race getting replaced by infinite Muslims and niggers, same path as all of Europe unfortunately.
But yeah they can tax the niggers, because I'm leaving

62263623
>>62262204
Hmm... then 529 and HSA are the only two I can think of.

529 is specifically an account for children that adults pay into. As long as the cash is used for school expenses, it's tax free.

An HSA is a Health Savings Account that you can put up to $4,400 in + invest it. Anything used for medical expenses is tax free and you can also use your contributions as a deduction on your taxes. The capital gains and interest are also tax free.

Roth IRA is also technically a retirement account, so I'll remove that one.

62263647
I wish the US had something. I’ve held apple stock since 2003. gonna get raped when I eventually sell.

62263656
>>62263260
One of the most boring countries in the world, which has its pros (very safe, good to raise kids) and cons (there’s nothing to do)

62263980
>>62263623
I wasn't asking for a list of random options. I more meant how much do most people on here get to invest in a tax free portfolio per year..

62264140
>>62261457
There are no tax free portfolios in my cunt
